MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John M. Le Blanc, Esq. of BARGER & WOLEN 213/680-2800, for defendant CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA, demurring party
No appearance by plaintiff. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA is OVERRULED as to 3rd c/a fraud -- promise without intent to perform, and as to 4th c/a negligent misrepresentation, SUSTAINED with leave as to 5th c/a intentional infliction of emotional distress. (JJM/301/CL) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
